title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.19 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD holding above 1.1711, with ECB rate at 2% and Fed rate at 3.75%; rate divergence may continue to weigh on EUR/USD.

title: CFTC — AUD
text: Leveraged Fund net position in AUD at +41,458, long% at 71.1%; watch for potential long squeeze.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 19.2 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment intact, but watch for potential shifts.

title: Cross-Asset Correlation Breaks
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break at +1.39σ; JPY no longer acting as safe haven, impacting USD/JPY positioning.
